message:
perf(combinator,runtime): #[inline] join/race/retry predicates + local task ops

- join.rs: #[inline] all_succeeded, success_count, failure_count
- race.rs: #[inline] all winner_index, is_first, is_second, map_first/second,
  is_error, is_cancelled, is_panicked, winner_succeeded (17 methods)
- retry.rs: #[inline] is_ok, is_failed, is_cancelled, is_panicked,
  into_outcome, has_attempts_remaining, attempts_remaining, policy
- local.rs: #[inline] remove_local_task, local_task_count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
